'''Eczar''' was an astronomical object<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> located within the [[Eczar system/Legends|Eczar system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Filar-Nitzan/Legends|Filar-Nitzan]] infiltrator [[Vacander]] maintained a [[Bank/Legends|bank]] account on Eczar<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Eczar was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Eczar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Eczar, in grid square M-18.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
